semantics: constructor is read observably before the inspector fallback and abrupt completion is preserved
falsy constructor values enter the no-color formatter with max depth 8 and quoted nested strings
ordinary own keys retain ECMAScript order and the constructor key is suppressed
ordinary accessors render as Getter, Setter, or Getter/Setter without invocation
active recursion paths render Circular while repeated non-cyclic references render again
Proxy values render their target without invoking ownKeys or descriptor traps during formatting
nodejs.util.inspect.custom is read observably on non-Proxy objects and called with depth, options, and inspect
custom inspect string results are emitted directly while non-string results recurse
the custom inspect helper uses single-line output and inspect-style string quoting
UTF-16 strings and keys preserve lone surrogates through escaped JSON-compatible output
formatting allocation failure returns no partial owned BunString and keeps the first pending exception
